content.content:
1	# ============================================================
2	# Frontend Dockerfile - Vue 3 + Vite (Multi-stage build)
3	# ============================================================
4	
5	# Stage 1: Build with Node.js
6	FROM node:20-alpine AS build
7	WORKDIR /app
8	
9	# Copy package files first to cache dependencies
10	COPY package*.json ./
11	RUN npm ci --prefer-offline
12	
13	# Copy source and build
14	COPY . .
15	RUN npm run build
16	
17	# Stage 2: Output the build artifacts
18	# The dist files are copied to a shared volume by docker-compose
19	FROM alpine:3.19
20	WORKDIR /build-output
21	
22	# Copy built files from build stage
23	COPY --from=build /app/dist .
24	
25	# Keep container alive briefly so volume mount works
26	CMD ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Frontend build complete.' && ls -la /build-output/"]
